summary: Valid user registration with all required fields
steps: Enter valid email, password, full name
testData: Email: test@example.com, Password: Test123, Full Name: John Doe
expectedResult: User account is successfully created and redirected to the home page

summary: Valid user registration with optional fields
steps: Enter valid email, password, full name, and optional fields like phone number and address
testData: Email: test2@example.com, Password: Test123, Full Name: Jane Smith, Phone Number: 123-456-7890, Address: 123 Main St
expectedResult: User account is successfully created with optional fields filled

steps: Enter valid password and full name
testData: Email: invalidemail, Password: Test123, Full Name: Sarah
expectedResult: Error message displayed for invalid email format

steps: Leave email, password, or full name field blank
testData: Email: , Password: Test123, Full Name: Alex
expectedResult: Error message displayed for missing required fields

summary: User registration with maximum character limit for fields
steps: Enter max character limit for email, password, and full name fields
testData: Email: maxcharacterlimit@example.com, Password: MaxCharacter1234567890, Full Name: Lorem Ipsum
expectedResult: User account is successfully created with maximum character limit for fields

summary: User registration without accepting terms and conditions
steps: Enter valid email, password, full name
Do not accept the terms and conditions checkbox
testData: Email: test3@example.com, Password: Test123, Full Name: Michael
expectedResult: Error message displayed for not accepting terms and conditions
